channel.title: Brewing on zhouyang — The 25th Frame
channel.description: Recent content in Brewing on zhouyang — The 25th Frame

item.title: Gaiwan: Three Fingers, One Lid, and a Thousand Years of Tea
item.description: The first time I tried to use a gaiwan, I burned my fingers so badly I dropped the entire thing into the tea tray. Porcelain clattered against bamboo. Tea splashed across the table in a hot amber wave.
